## What happened
A clear description of what you observed.

## What you expected
A clear description of what you expected to see.

## Reproduction
```bash
mvcf analyze --fixture <name>
```

## Environment
- `mvcf --version`:
- Python:
- OS:

## Severity
- [ ] Headline metric is materially wrong (would mislead a curator)
- [ ] Crash or parsing error
- [ ] Cosmetic / docs
